symptom_vector: Node CPU overload, high CPU usage, CPU saturation, CPU spike, node CPU stress

reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [aiops-k8s-07] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [frontend] in Trace data (From GT key_observations keyword list)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found metric [node_cpu_usage_rate] in Metric data (From GT key_observations keyword list)
Step 4: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [node_cpu_usage_rate] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Trace data shows frontend service calls to cartservice on node aiops-k8s-07 with increased latency
critical_checks.instruction: Search for traces where service_name contains 'frontend' and node_name is 'aiops-k8s-07'

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Metric data shows node_cpu_usage_rate metric exists in the system but no anomaly detected for aiops-k8s-07
